description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Migrate from Oracle Database to Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server with Managed Identity authentication
tasks.reason: Oracle Database is an on-premises, licensed database that is not suitable for cloud-native Azure deployments. Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server offers a fully managed, scalable PostgreSQL service with native Managed Identity support for secure, credential-free authentication. This eliminates the need to manage Oracle licenses and credentials.
tasks.requirements: Replace Oracle JDBC driver (ojdbc8) with PostgreSQL JDBC driver. Update Spring datasource configuration and JPA dialect from OracleDialect to PostgreSQL. Refactor Oracle-specific native SQL queries to PostgreSQL-compatible SQL: replace ROWNUM with LIMIT/OFFSET, replace TO_CHAR date formatting, and refactor RANK() window function queries. Replace BLOB column type handling (byte[]) with PostgreSQL bytea. Configure Managed Identity for credential-free authentication to Azure Database for PostgreSQL. Remove Oracle-specific docker-compose oracle-db service references.
tasks.taskSummary: Replaced ojdbc8 with PostgreSQL JDBC driver, added azure-identity-extensions for Managed Identity, updated datasource config and JPA dialect, refactored Oracle-specific SQL (ROWNUM→LIMIT, NVL→COALESCE, TO_CHAR→EXTRACT), removed @Lob annotation for bytea compatibility, updated docker-compose.yml to remove Oracle service. Build and tests passed.

tasks.description: Update the existing Dockerfile to use Java 21 base images, replacing the current Java 8 Maven and runtime images
tasks.reason: After upgrading to Java 21, the Dockerfile must be updated to use the corresponding Java 21 base images. Using outdated Java 8 images would prevent the application from running correctly.
tasks.requirements: Update the build stage FROM image from maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-8 to maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-21. Update the runtime stage FROM image from eclipse-temurin:8-jre to eclipse-temurin:21-jre. Ensure Docker build succeeds with the updated images.
